name: Braintree
description: Braintree GraphQL payments API for querying and mutating customers, payment methods, transactions, disputes, refunds, and related payment objects.

credential_fields.name: api_host
credential_fields.label: API Host
credential_fields.description: Use https://payments.sandbox.braintree-api.com for sandbox or https://payments.braintree-api.com for production.

credential_fields.name: basic_auth
credential_fields.label: Basic Auth
credential_fields.description: Base64-encoded Braintree public key and private key for HTTP Basic auth. Do not include the 'Basic ' prefix.

credential_fields.name: braintree_version
credential_fields.label: Braintree Version
credential_fields.description: GraphQL API version date, for example 2024-01-01.

tools.name: graphql_request
tools.description: Execute a Braintree GraphQL query or mutation. Use this for customers, transactions, payment methods, refunds, disputes, reports, and any GraphQL operation supported by the connected merchant account.
